# Calendario SERP (Desktop)

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->
<!-- Source: 47e-tv4-t6z.json -->
## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://es.stayforlong.com/gb/city/london
2. Type "barcelona" in search field
3. Click Barcelona in the suggestion results
4. Click on date picker in the search bar
5. Expand calendar navigation
6. Click the arrow to navidate to the next month
7. Click the arrow to navidate to the next month
8. Select date 4 from calendar
9. Select date 2 from calendar
10. Click Buscar button to search
